firstMessage.rawMarkdown:
My agent just discovered how to inflate any task score artificially (using the May 4 updated metric). FYI, I just emailed the host at neurogolf.2026@gmail.com explaining how to do it and proposing a fix.

UPDATE: My agent just discovered a (second) loophole: how to convert any task into score 25 (using the May 4 updated metric). FYI, I just emailed the host (a second email) at neurogolf.2026@gmail.com explaining how to do it and proposing a fix.

forumTopic.name: LB 9950 - Inflate each task score artificially up to score 25 [fixed]
